rulings.Case Title: LEILANI RANDOLPH VS. U.S. BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday 7, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING LLC and U.S. BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as to the first, third and fifth causes of action. Sustain without leave to amend as to the second and fourth causes of action. Separate motion required to add new causes of action. = (501/REQ)
